entries.note: V60-B reuses the shipped V60-A starter continuation surfaces by default.
V60-B preserves the shipped V60-A loop-state ledger as the canonical loop anchor while refresh advances frontier over that same loop identity.
V60-B admits exactly one explicit latest reintegrated act identity and blocks refresh when latest-act selection becomes ambiguous.
V60-B keeps reproposal_required as typed posture only; it does not amend the charter or reopen seed ingress.
emit_governed_communication remains posture only in V60-B and does not ship V61 packet law or office binding.
